name: Allied Electronics Corporation Limited
summary: Allied Electronics Corporation Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides ICT solutions in South Africa and internationally. It operates through Managed Services, Digital Transformation, Smart IoT, Healthech/Fintech, and Others segments. The Managed Services segment offers hardware and consumables to manage outsource print services, such as installation and training; supplies paper and toner; maintains and services equipment and service contracts; supports and maintains enterprise-wide information products and services; talent management services; and outsourcing services for contact centers and extended capabilities. The Digital Transformation segment provides turnkey solutions for communications and information needs; networking, hardware, software, storage, software integration, SAP and management consulting, Microsoft certified solution, data warehousing, CRM, and support services; information security and risk management, and IT infrastructure solutions; systems integration; and designs, develops, and implements specialised solutions. The Smart IoT segment offers vehicle tracking and recovery systems, fleet management services, and usage-based telematics. The Healthech/Fintech segment provides managed electronic payment solutions, including mobile or online platforms, e-wallet, and medical transaction switching. The Others segment distributes industrial electronic components, such as batteries and solar products; lighting and optics; software and compilers; and semiconductor and aerospace products. Allied Electronics Corporation Limited was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Parktown, South Africa.
